name: joshuaccarroll-plugins
description: Personal plugin marketplace for Claude Code

plugins.name: harmonize
plugins.description: Reviews recently changed code and harmonizes it with the patterns, conventions, and style of the surrounding codebase

plugins.name: explain
plugins.description: Explains code or concepts in succinct, plain English

plugins.name: workflow-orchestrator
plugins.description: Create and execute structured YAML workflows with conditional logic, loops, parallel execution, and intelligent skill routing
